query: SELECT id, name, type, code, contactPerson, status FROM cardCompanies WHERE name LIKE '%Amazon%' OR name LIKE '%Google%' OR name LIKE '%Alibaba%' OR name LIKE '%Schneider%' OR name LIKE '%Siemens%' ORDER BY type, name;
